{{Infobox character
| name = Urzaia Woodsman
| aliases = The Woodsman, Urzaia, Woodsman
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Soulbound powers]], [[Awakened weapons]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Urzaia Woodsman|Woodsman]], [[Champion]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Champion’s Guild|Champion's Guild]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|cook, gladiator, warrior}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|, fighter}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|, [[Navigator captain|navigator captain]], [[Navigator captain]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Testament]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, the tower}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

''See also: [[Urzaia Woodsman Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urzaia Woodsman, also known as the Woodsman, is a large and physically imposing individual who serves as the cook aboard the navigator vessel [[The Testament]] under Captain [[Calder]] [[Marten]]. Originally from [[Axciss]], a city known for its gladiator culture, he was once a member of the [[Champion’s Guild]]. Following an exile in bad standing, he was forced to serve a term as an undefeated gladiator in an [[Izyrian arena]] to clear a debt to the [[Imperial]] throne. He earned his moniker because his combat style with dual hatchets resembled woodcutting. During his time in the arena, he survived for over a year against extreme odds, including fighting creatures like the [[Cinderbeast]] and the [[Houndmaster]]. His combat experience granted him enhanced physical attributes, such as rapid healing, resistance to most poisons, and heightened senses. Physically, Urzaia is characterized by his tanned, heavily scarred skin, a broken nose, and a gap-toothed smile. He often wears mismatched, patchwork clothing including leather armor and a kilt, with his blond hair tied back in a tail. He utilizes two dark, [[Awakened hatchets]] as his primary weapons and carries the golden hide of a [[Sandborn Hydra]] wrapped around one arm, which serves as his [[Soulbound Vessel]]. Despite his history of violence and his capacity for immense strength—capable of tearing doors from hinges or snapping trees—he is often depicted as a cheerful and kind-hearted person.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia Woodsman is a large, blond [[Soulbound]] warrior and former member of the [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]] who serves as the cook on the ship [[The Testament]]. An [[Izyrian gladiator]] with a scarred face, missing teeth, and arms wrapped in leather and gold-scaled hide, he was previously banished to the arena in hopes that combat would kill him. During his time as a crew member, he performed watch duty and utilized the strength of a [[Sandborn Hydra]] to fight with two black hatchets. While tracking a [[Consultant]] target across an island, he became trapped inside a boulder and was ultimately killed by the [[Consultants]]. He remains deceased, remembered as a warrior with a hole in his chest.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">32</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is a person [[Calder]] mentions.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] crafts the meals onboard [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is the ship's cook.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is known by the name Woodsman.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia rose to his feet with a hatchet in each hand.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is a man on watch duty.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is a crew member who fights with a black hatchet.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia has a scarred face.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is a large man with two missing teeth and arms wrapped in leather and gold-scaled hide.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] was banished to the arena in hopes that the fights would kill him.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is a character present on the ship.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is a character who responds to [[Calder]]'s shout with an animal roar.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is a blond man who fights with two black hatchets.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is a [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia used a hatchet to strike a bone-crab.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] thinks of Urzaia's promise.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] believes he needs Urzaia.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] is an [[Izyrian gladiator]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is a crew member who can sense the presence of [[Shera]]'s partner.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] is a former member of the [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia tracked a [[Consultant]] target to the far side of the island.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] draws on the strength of a [[Sandborn Hydra]] and carries two hatchets.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is inside the boulder.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia swings a hatchet.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is a person [[Calder]] [[Marten]] believes might be killed by the current interruption.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] intends to save Urzaia.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is an [[Izyrian gladiator]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is also referred to as Woodsman.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia was killed by the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is a [[Soulbound]] warrior with a hole in his chest.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia's full name is [[Urzaia Woodsman]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Urzaia is deceased.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Soulbound]] cook and the largest member of the crew, Urzaia Woodsman possesses an enhanced body and the appearance of an [[Izyrian gladiator]]. This scarred fighter, who wears mismatched armor and wields a black hatchet in each hand, is a [[Champion]] that [[Shera]] intended to face in the underground arena. During a confrontation, Urzaia grappled with [[Meia]] before kicking her away in a bloody fury and preparing to lunge with a weapon. Despite having a fire-hurling wife, the warrior eventually lost his hold on life while [[Calder]] knelt by his side.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">15</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] is the [[Soulbound]] cook and the largest member of the crew.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] looks like an [[Izyrian gladiator]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Urzaia is a person who could potentially attack if woken up.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] uses a black hatchet in each hand.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] has a fire-hurling wife.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] was grappling with Urzaia.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] is a [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] is a fighter with a scarred face and mismatched armor.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Urzaia is someone [[Shera]] planned to fight in the underground arena.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] is a [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] kicked [[Meia]] away in a bloody fury.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] prepared to lunge with a black hatchet.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] is kneeling by Urzaia.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] has given up his hold on life.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Urzaia was a [[Champion]] with an enhanced body.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A former [[Champion]] and [[Navigator captain]], Urzaia Woodsman is a missing member of [[Calder]]'s crew who was discovered being held in a cage on a ship. Having defied the [[Emperor's command]] to die for three years, the undefeated arena fighter survived by wearing mismatched leather and chain mesh armor, a gold-scaled hide on his arm, and an ornate snake-carved belt buckle. During combat, he utilized signature black hatchets, [[Awakened weapons]], and [[Soulbound powers]], even riding a [[Cinderbeast]] like a horseman. Although [[Meia]] possesses enough enhancements to fight him toe-to-toe, Urzaia was ultimately killed by [[Shera]]. Despite his death, [[Calder]] and the crew maintained an objective to rescue him, remembering his promise to stand in front of [[Calder]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">26</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia is someone [[Calder]] has lost.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] possesses a similar quality to Urzaia.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia is a prisoner being held in a cage on the ship.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia is a former [[Champion]] and [[Navigator captain]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] is a [[Consultant]] who can fight Urzaia.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] has enough enhancements to fight toe-to-toe with [[Urzaia Woodsman]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia was condemned to the arena to die.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c15">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia wears mismatched armor consisting of leather straps and chain mesh.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia has a gold-scaled hide wrapped around his left arm.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia uses black hatchets as his signature weapons.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia has an ornate belt-buckle carved in the image of a snake eating its own tail.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia has defied the [[Emperor's command]] to die on the sands for three years.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Woodsman is an undefeated fighter in the arena.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia was killed by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|There is a daring plan to rescue Urzaia.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia is being planned for rescue by [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] ran toward the [[Cinderbeast]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] rode the [[Cinderbeast]]'s back like a horseman.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia wears a golden hide around his upper arm.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia used [[Awakened weapons]] and [[Soulbound powers]] to strike the [[Cinderbeast]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia claims to be a very good cook.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia is a missing member of [[Calder]]'s crew.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia is a [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The crew's objective is to get Urzaia.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] uses hatchets.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urzaia promised to stand in front of [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A known acquaintance of [[Calder]]'s crew, Urzaia Woodsman serves as the cook on [[The Testament]] and is a [[Champion]]. This massive individual with dirty blond hair and blue eyes once emerged from the woods wielding a hatchet. While resting in the tower, Urzaia often sleeps in leather armor and gladiator regalia with weapons kept close at hand. The undefeated fighter of the [[Izyrian arena]] is known for a laughter that echoes over the ocean and possesses the ability to stem the flow of giant worms.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urzaia is a person [[Calder]]'s crew members knew.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] is the cook on [[The Testament]] and a [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c8">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urzaia has blue eyes.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urzaia emerged from the woods holding a hatchet.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urzaia is a [[Champion]] who carries a hatchet.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urzaia is sleeping in the tower.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urzaia is someone who often sleeps in their armor and keeps weapons close.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urzaia's laughter echoed over the ocean.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urzaia claimed to be undefeated in the [[Izyrian arena]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urzaia is a huge man with blue eyes and dirty blond hair.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urzaia wears gladiator regalia and leather armor.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urzaia could stem the flow of giant worms.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“First, let me introduce the man who crafts all the meals we will enjoy onboard The Testament: Urzaia Woodsman!”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“URZAIA!” An animal roar answered him from the edge of the crater.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Urzaia Woodsman,” she recited. “Former member of the Champion’s Guild, exiled in bad standing, forced to serve a term in an Izyrian arena until his debt to the Imperial throne was cleared, or until his death.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Get ready,” Calder said, hefting his pistol. “Urzaia’s inside.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“I’m afraid that an interruption right now would just kill him. If he survives long enough, I’ll come back for him.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Champion’s Guild]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
